summary: Caffeine AI app: restore previous purple/white theme and fix Caffeine builder Draft tab showing blank/empty screen.
known_issues: Theme color changed unexpectedly (purple/white theme not applied).
Caffeine builder Draft tab loads blank/empty.

existing_features.title: Restore the app’s previous purple-and-white color theme across all screens by reverting any recent theme/token changes and ensuring the UI consistently uses the purple primary accent with white/light surfaces (and appropriate dark-mode equivalents).

Fix the app’s “Draft” option/screen so it no longer renders an empty/blank page and instead reliably shows meaningful content or a clear empty-state message (in English) when there is no draft data to display.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore the app’s previous purple + white theme (revert recent color change).
Fix Caffeine builder’s Draft tab showing an empty/blank screen.
